assertions: D7: Reader dynamically populated with real chapters and book TOC titles.

vision_verdict: pass. The dashboard interface is fully functional and presents a clear, organized layout. The "All Libraries" section is correctly initialized, and the interactive elements, including the navigation menu and user profile controls, are displayed with proper alignment and spacing. The system demonstrates a consistent UI design, and the modal overlay is positioned correctly within the viewport, ensuring that the navigational flow and instructional content remain visible and accessible to the user. All design components appear stable and well-integrated.
